INNER JOIN [Class] AS [c] ON [v].[ClassId] = [c].[ClassID]
INNER JOIN [Subject] AS [s] ON [v].[SubjectId] = [s].[SubjectID]
WHERE [v].[TeacherId] = @teacherId
ORDER BY [v].[StartTime] DESC
OFFSET @p ROWS FETCH NEXT @p2 ROWS ONLY

SELECT COUNT(*)
FROM [VirtualClass] AS [v]
INNER JOIN [Class] AS [c] ON [v].[ClassId] = [c].[ClassID]
